## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why -->

## Changes
- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Test changes
- [ ] Documentation changes

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)

## Test plan
<!-- How did you verify the change works? -->
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/ scripts/` clean
- [ ] `python scripts/train.py --smoke-test ...` smoke test passes
- [ ] Manual scenarios tested:

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff format`)
- [ ] New code has tests (≥80% line coverage)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or public API changed
- [ ] No secrets / API keys / private data committed
- [ ] CI is green
